mapper.select: /** UsptExpertClMapngDao.selectMapngList */ select a.expert_nm /**전문가명**/ , a.wrc_nm /**부서명**/ , a.ofcps_nm /**직위명**/ , b.expert_id /**전문가ID**/ , b.expert_cl_id /**전문가분류ID**/ , b.creator_id , b.created_dt from uspt_expert a /**전문가**/ inner join uspt_expert_cl_mapng b /**전문가분류매핑**/ on a.expert_id = b.expert_id and b.expert_cl_id = #{expertClId}

/** UsptExpertClMapngDao.selectExpertReqsList */ select a.expert_id /**전문가ID**/ , a.expert_cl_id /**전문가분류ID**/ , b.parnts_expert_cl_id from uspt_expert_cl_mapng a /**전문가분류매핑**/ inner join uspt_expert_cl b on a.expert_cl_id = b.expert_cl_id and b.enabled = true where a.expert_id = #{expertId}
